modal.title: Choose your language
modal.description: Select your preferred language for SmartLink.
modal.englishDescription: Use SmartLink in English across the full experience.
modal.chichewaDescription: Use SmartLink in Chichewa for a more familiar flow.
modal.note: You can change this later from the top navigation.

hero.subtitle: SmartLink brings live station visibility, queue awareness, reservations, and forecourt coordination into one connected operating layer.
hero.metric1Label: Availability updates before drivers commit to a stop
hero.metric2Label: Queue pressure visible across active service locations
hero.metric3Label: Payments, loyalty, and reservations fit one system
hero.panelSub: A calmer fuel journey for drivers and stronger coordination for operators.
hero.summary1Body: Live stock status from active station feeds
hero.summary2Body: Wait pressure surfaced before drivers arrive
hero.tileOpsBody: Dashboards, telemetry, and cleaner forecourt coordination.

mapPreview.title: Plan each fuel stop with live context, not rumours.
mapPreview.subtitle: Compare nearby stations, see queue pressure, confirm fuel type, and choose the best next stop before you commit.
mapPreview.bullet1: Check nearby stations and expected queue pressure
mapPreview.bullet3: Receive alerts as your service window moves
mapPreview.insight1: Cuts wasted trips when stock changes unexpectedly
mapPreview.insight2: Reduces forecourt crowding by spreading demand earlier
mapPreview.insight3: Gives drivers a clearer service expectation

how.title: Move from discovery to service in three controlled steps.
how.subtitle: The same flow keeps drivers informed while giving stations cleaner demand signals.
how.step1Body: See availability, queue direction, and distance in one disciplined shortlist.
how.step2Title: Join a queue or reserve a service window
how.step2Body: Pick the best station, prepay when needed, and avoid uncertainty before departure.
how.step3Body: Receive alerts, cleaner reconciliation, and a calmer handoff at the forecourt.

features.title: Core capabilities for fuel access coordination
features.subtitle: SmartLink stays specific to fuel discovery, operations, and digital payment readiness.
features.availabilityBody: Operators publish active stock status so drivers can decide earlier and travel with more certainty.
features.queueBody: Live queue signals help users avoid overloaded stations and plan arrival times with less guesswork.
features.reservationBody: Approved reserve windows and prepay flows smooth demand during peak periods.
features.verifiedBody: Forecourt teams update pumps, queue state, and service availability from one workflow.
features.alertsBody: Operational data supports audits, exports, and network-level reporting.
features.transparencyBody: Digital payments and reward flows fit into the same service journey without extra noise.

stations.title: One operating layer for drivers, stations, fleets, and network partners.
stations.subtitle: SmartLink feels consumer-friendly on the surface, but the platform is built for disciplined operational coordination underneath.
stations.description: Use SmartLink to reduce forecourt congestion, improve customer trust, support digital payments, and expose cleaner operational data across the network.
stations.driversBody: Find supply faster, compare queues, reserve eligible slots, and pay with more confidence.
stations.stationsBody: Manage demand, update service readiness, and keep the forecourt moving with less friction.
stations.enterpriseBody: Support fleet workflows, regulatory visibility, and multi-site coordination through one platform layer.
stations.enterprisePoint3: Consistent data for partners and regulators
stations.devTitle: Integrations that fit station infrastructure, not just marketing pages.
stations.devBody: Connect queue events, wallet workflows, telemetry, reporting, and monitoring into existing station or fleet systems.

trust.title: Built for calmer queues, clearer station communication, and accountable service.
trust.item1Label: Availability and queue changes surfaced as they happen
trust.item2Label: Reservations, prepay flows, and operator actions leave an audit trail
trust.item3Label: Partner dashboards support reconciliation, reporting, and live updates
trust.item4Label: Fleet, regulator, and integration workflows fit the same operating layer

finalCta.title: Bring calmer, more transparent fuel access to every route.
finalCta.subtitle: Join SmartLink to discover live station availability, request onboarding for your station, or prepare your operations team for digital queue and payment workflows.
finalCta.note: SmartLink is designed for Malawi fuel users, station teams, and infrastructure partners.

footer.tagline: Fuel discovery, queue coordination, reservations, and station operations in one service layer.
